analysis.primary_subject: Unfinished wooden shelving unit with multiple compartments and shelves

craftsmanship_quality.precision: Medium - The shelves appear to be aligned but some edges show slight irregularities
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: Medium - The plywood surfaces are smooth but not yet finished, showing raw edges and some visible nail holes
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: Medium - The assembly is structurally sound but lacks finishing touches and refinements

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image showcases a work-in-progress shelving unit made from plywood and wooden battens. The design features multiple compartments and shelves, highlighting the assembly stage before finishing touches are applied.
